raw_consumer_statement:
Amex rejected my dispute within minutes claiming " they gathered documentation proving the charge is valid ''. This is impossible because the charge is NOT valid ( I provided the relevant documentation showing it ) and they could not possibly contact the merchant and receive documentation within less than 10 minutes as they claim. They also failed to provide a copy of this so-called documentation.

Amex also keeps rebilling me for fraudulent charges based upon fraudulent documentation coming from a foreign country. Furthermore, they have never provided a copy of the fraudulent documents they claim to hold as they are legally required to do.

Two different cards are involved now.
